mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_APP_SCOPE.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO APP_SCOPE( ID, NAME, TYPE, STATUS, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_SCOPE SET NAME=#{name}, TYPE=#{type}, STATUS=#{status}, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#{lastUpdatedBy}, LAST_UPDATE_DATE=SYSDATE WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE APP_SCOPE SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM APP_SCOPE WHERE ENABLED_FLAG=1
AND ID IN
#{id}
ORDER BY ID

SELECT ID, NAME FROM APP_SCOPE scope, APP_SCOPE_COURSE_REL rel WHERE scope.ID=rel.SCOPE_ID AND scope.ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND scope.STATUS=1 AND scope.TYPE=#{type} AND rel.COURSE_ID=#{courseId}
ORDER BY ID
